title: Host Contact Locations
entries: in an unknown location - they are hard to pin down, always on the move
in a nearby village
that passes through here occasionally, might want to ask around
that frequents the area, keep and eye out and you're bound to bump into them
that lives right nearby
that lives just a few villages away
quite a distance from here in a remote location, you'll need your map marked
who is basically unreachable. Let their people know, they'll find you
in a secluded forest cabin, where few dare to tread
aboard a ship, they are always on the sea traveling from port to port
within the mountain caves, they have ties to the miners
across the great desert, in an oasis town
in the high towers, always looking towards the skies
underground, they prefer the company of the earth to that of people
in the bustling markets, trading and bartering
by the riverside, always listening to its tales
in a sacred temple, seeking enlightenment
on the frontier outposts, guarding our lands from threats
within the royal courts, influencing the decisions of the high and mighty
at the crossroads, where all paths meet
in the shadowy alleyways, away from prying eyes
in the grand library, amidst scrolls and ancient tomes
at the local tavern, where stories and drinks flow freely
by the ancient ruins, drawing inspiration from the past
in the mystical groves, communing with nature
atop the highest peak, where the world seems small below
in a traveling caravan, always seeking the next adventure
among the nomadic tribes, moving with the seasons
in a hidden lagoon, where the waters whisper secrets
